notes: International standards organization for secure-element (SE) and Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) specifications. Underpins essentially every smart card, eSIM, mobile secure element, and ARM/Intel TEE deployment. Members-only specifications.

data.notes: Members-only. Specification series for TEE Client API, TEE Internal Core API, TEE System Architecture. Underpins ARM TrustZone, Intel SGX implementations of GP TEE profiles.
Members-only. The dominant secure-element specification — used in essentially every smart card, eSIM, and embedded SE.
